metadata.description: Feature flags for graceful removal of middleware as model improves

FEATURE_SOCRATIC_QUESTIONING.rationale: Resolve ambiguities in user input before test execution
FEATURE_SOCRATIC_QUESTIONING.removal_condition: Agent demonstrates 100% clarity without questioning for 10 consecutive sessions
FEATURE_SOCRATIC_QUESTIONING.notes: Core safety mechanism; unlikely to remove

FEATURE_STATE_CHECKPOINTS.rationale: Enable recovery from context window limits via checkpoints
FEATURE_STATE_CHECKPOINTS.removal_condition: Context window limits no longer a concern (e.g., 16K+ tokens standard)
FEATURE_STATE_CHECKPOINTS.notes: Becomes unnecessary as model context grows; safe to remove

FEATURE_ESCALATION_GATES.rationale: Prevent agent mistakes by escalating critical errors to human review
FEATURE_ESCALATION_GATES.notes: Can be loosened once error rate proven low

FEATURE_RALPH_LOOPS.rationale: Recover from context resets via state serialization and reinjection
FEATURE_RALPH_LOOPS.removal_condition: Context windows never approach limit in practice (3 resets never needed)
FEATURE_RALPH_LOOPS.notes: Becomes dead code once context large enough; safe to remove

FEATURE_AUDIT_LOGGING.rationale: Maintain full audit trail for compliance and debugging
FEATURE_AUDIT_LOGGING.notes: Essential for any production system; do not remove

FEATURE_SECONDARY_VALIDATION.rationale: Secondary LLM validation of test administration (QA Auditor)
FEATURE_SECONDARY_VALIDATION.removal_condition: Primary agent reliability reaches 99.9% without secondary review
FEATURE_SECONDARY_VALIDATION.notes: Can be removed if primary agent proves reliable; safe to disable

FEATURE_PATTERN_AUDITING.rationale: Automated detection of dead code, circular deps, duplication

removal_protocol.step_3: Add deprecation warning in code comments
removal_protocol.step_5: Update git history and create release notes
removal_protocol.example: If FEATURE_STATE_CHECKPOINTS removal approved: Remove all checkpoint code, update CLAUDE.md §17, commit with 'chore: remove FEATURE_STATE_CHECKPOINTS (no longer needed)'
